title: verbascum × suberiocarpum
intro: Verbascum × suberiocarpum, also known as a hybrid of the mullein plant, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the figwort family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The leaves and flowers of the Verbascum × suberiocarpum plant are rich in mucilage, which helps to soothe and calm irritated tissues, making it a natural remedy for various health benefits including relieving cold and flu symptoms, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
